title: ClawJacked attack let malicious websites hijack OpenClaw to steal data
summary: Security researchers have disclosed a high-severity vulnerability dubbed "ClawJacked" in the popular AI agent OpenClaw that allowed a malicious website to silently bruteforce access to a locally running instance and take control over it. [...]

title: Samsung TVs to stop collecting Texans’ data without express consent
summary: Samsung and the State of Texas have reached a settlement agreement over the alleged unlawful collection of content-viewing information through its smart TVs [...]

title: CyberStrikeAI tool adopted by hackers for AI-powered attacks
summary: Researchers warn that a newly identified open-source AI security testing platform called CyberStrikeAI was used by the same threat actor behind a recent campaign that breached hundreds of Fortinet FortiGate firewalls. [...]

title: Fake Google Security site uses PWA app to steal credentials, MFA codes
summary: A phishing campaign is using a fake Google Account security page to deliver a web-based app capable of stealing one-time passcodes, harvesting cryptocurrency wallet addresses, and proxying attacker traffic through victims' browsers. [...]

title: Alabama man pleads guilty to hacking, extorting hundreds of women
summary: A 22-year-old Alabama man pleaded guilty to extortion, cyberstalking, and computer fraud charges after hijacking the social media accounts of hundreds of young women (including minors). [...]

title: Florida woman imprisoned for massive Microsoft license fraud scheme
summary: A Florida woman was sentenced to 22 months in prison for running a massive years-long scheme to traffic thousands of stolen Microsoft Certificate of Authenticity (COA) labels. [...]

title: UK warns of Iranian cyberattack risks amid Middle-East conflict

title: How Deepfakes and Injection Attacks Are Breaking Identity Verification
summary: Deepfakes and injection attacks are targeting identity verification moments, from onboarding to account recovery. Incode explains why enterprises must validate the full session—media, device integrity, and behavior—to stop synthetic and injected attacks in real time. [...]

title: Anthropic confirms Claude is down in a worldwide outage
summary: Claude appears to be having a major outage right now, with elevated errors reported across all platforms. [...]

summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a VMware Aria Operations vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-22719 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, flagging the flaw as exploited in attacks. [...]

title: Paint maker giant AkzoNobel confirms cyberattack on U.S. site
summary: The multinational Dutch paint company AkzoNobel has confirmed to BleepingComputer that hackers breached the network of one of its U.S. sites. [...]

title: Facebook accounts unavailable in worldwide outage
summary: Social media giant Facebook is currently experiencing a massive worldwide outage, preventing users from accessing their accounts. [...]

title: Microsoft: Hackers abuse OAuth error flows to spread malware
summary: Hackers are abusing the legitimate OAuth redirection mechanism to bypass phishing protections in email and browsers to take users to malicious pages. [...]

title: Google Chrome shifts to two-week release cycle for increased stability
summary: Google Chrome will shift from a four-week to a two-week release cycle to roll out new features, bug fixes, and performance improvements more frequently. [...]

title: LexisNexis confirms data breach as hackers leak stolen files

title: Compromised Site Management Panels are a Hot Item in Cybercrime Markets
summary: Compromised cPanel credentials are being sold in bulk across underground channels as plug-and-play phishing and scam infrastructure. Flare explains how analyzing 200,000 underground posts reveals a commoditized market for hacked site management panels. [...]

title: Amazon: Drone strikes damaged AWS data centers in Middle East
summary: Amazon has confirmed that three Amazon Web Services (AWS) data centers in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) and one in Bahrain have been damaged by drone strikes, causing an extensive outage that is still affecting dozens of cloud computing services. [...]

title: Android gets patches for Qualcomm zero-day exploited in attacks

title: Bitwarden adds support for passkey login on Windows 11

title: Mail2Shell zero-click attack lets hackers hijack FreeScout mail servers

title: Windows 10 KB5075039 update fixes broken Recovery Environment

title: Hacker mass-mails HungerRush extortion emails to restaurant patrons

title: FBI seizes LeakBase cybercrime forum, data of 142,000 members

title: Europol-coordinated action disrupts Tycoon2FA phishing platform

title: How a Brute Force Attack Unmasked a Ransomware Infrastructure Network
summary: A routine RDP brute-force alert led to unusual credential hunting and a geo-distributed VPN-linked infrastructure. Huntress Labs explains how one compromised login unraveled a suspected ransomware-as-a-service ecosystem tied to initial access brokers. [...]

title: Chinese state hackers target telcos with new malware toolkit
summary: A China-linked advanced persistent threat actor tracked as UAT-9244 has been targeting telecommunication service providers in South America since 2024, compromising Windows, Linux, and network-edge devices. [...]

title: Bing AI promoted fake OpenClaw GitHub repo pushing info-stealing malware

title: Wikipedia hit by self-propagating JavaScript worm that vandalized pages

title: WordPress membership plugin bug exploited to create admin accounts

title: Google says 90 zero-days were exploited in attacks last year

title: 2026 Browser Data Reveals Major Enterprise Security Blind Spots
summary: The browser is becoming the operating system for modern work, yet many enterprises still treat it as an extension of network or endpoint security. Keep Aware's 2026 State of Browser Security Report shows 41% of employees used AI web tools while browser-based phishing, extensions, and social engineering drive new security blind spots. [...]

title: Police dismantles online gambling ring exploiting Ukrainian women

title: Cisco flags more SD-WAN flaws as actively exploited in attacks

title: EC-Council Expands AI Certification Portfolio to Strengthen U.S. AI Workforce Readiness and Security

title: Fake Claude Code install guides push infostealers in InstallFix attacks

title: Microsoft 365 Backup to add file-level restore for faster recovery

title: Ghanain man pleads guilty to role in $100 million fraud ring

title: FBI investigates breach of surveillance and wiretap systems
